name: Second Time Around Veal Stew"marengo" Style
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces mushrooms, trimmed and caps only sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sauté the mushrooms in butter until soft.
2. Add the orange zest and tomatoes, then white wine. Reduce the mixture until it thickens.
3. Add the veal stew and bring to a simmer.
4. Add the olives and season with salt and pepper to taste.
